status: IN-VITRO AND ANIMAL EVIDENCE STRUCTURED — HUMAN LONGEVITY EVIDENCE UNRESOLVED — NOT PLATINUM CERTIFIED
evidence_maturity: Human-cell in-vitro and animal ageing evidence exists; human clinical evidence is sparse, heterogeneous and often confounded with epithalamin.
identity_and_translation_boundary: Cell telomere effects and animal lifespan findings do not establish human longevity.
